description.pt-pt: Migração completa de infraestrutura on-premise para Azure Kubernetes Service com zero downtime. Escalou microservices 10x.
description.en: Complete migration from on-premise infrastructure to Azure Kubernetes Service with zero downtime. Scaled microservices 10x.
description.pt-br: Migração completa de infraestrutura on-premise para Azure Kubernetes Service com zero downtime. Escalou microservices 10x.
description.fr: Migration complète de l'infrastructure on-premise vers Azure Kubernetes Service sans interruption. Microservices mis à l'échelle 10x.
